Global (All).title: Global Pandemic Concerns Rise as BA.2 Subvariant Spreads
Global (All).summary: The BA.2 subvariant of the Omicron coronavirus is causing concern globally, leading to a rise in pandemic-related risks.

Global (All).title: Growing Tensions Between the US and China
Global (All).summary: The US and China are increasingly at odds over issues such as trade, security, and human rights, leading to heightened tensions.

Global (All).title: Increased Cyberattacks Targeting Global Companies
Global (All).summary: Global companies are experiencing a surge in cyberattacks, with hackers targeting sensitive data and disrupting business operations.

United States.title: US House Committee Votes to Hold Top Trump Aide in Contempt
United States.summary: A US House committee has voted to hold a top aide to former President Donald Trump in contempt, escalating a legal dispute between the two over documents seized by the FBI during a search of Trump's Florida estate.

United States.title: US House Passes Bill to Protect Same-Sex Marriage
United States.summary: The US House of Representatives has passed a bill to protect same-sex marriage, which now heads to the Senate. The bill aims to ensure that same-sex couples have the same rights as heterosexual couples in marriage equality, which has been a contentious issue in the US.

United States.title: US Supreme Court Blocks Biden's Student Loan Cancellation Plan
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court has blocked President Joe Biden's plan to cancel up to $20,000 in student loan debt for millions of Americans, a move that had been hailed as a major victory for student loan debtors.

South Korea.title: South Korea's President Yoon Orders Military to be on High Alert After North Korea's Missile Test
South Korea.summary: South Korea's President Yoon Suk-yeol has ordered the military to be on high alert after North Korea launched a ballistic missile into the Sea of Japan.

South Korea.title: Seoul Protests Against South Korea-Japan Trade Deal Amid Rising Tensions
South Korea.summary: Thousands of protesters gathered in Seoul to demonstrate against a new trade deal between South Korea and Japan, amid rising tensions between the two countries.

South Korea.title: South Korea Condemns Russia's Invasion of Ukraine as 'Criminal' and 'Unacceptable'
South Korea.summary: South Korea's government condemned Russia's invasion of Ukraine, calling it 'criminal' and 'unacceptable', and reiterated its support for the international community in calling for a peaceful resolution to the conflict.

Japan.title: Japan's LDP Loses 2/3 Majority in Upper House Elections
Japan.summary: The ruling Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) lost its two-thirds majority in Japan's upper house elections on July 10, marking a significant setback for Prime Minister Fumio Kishida's government. The LDP secured 103 seats, but its coalition partner, the Komeito party, won only 28 seats.

Japan.title: Tokyo Governor Yuriko Koike Fails to Win Upper House Seat
Japan.summary: Tokyo Governor Yuriko Koike failed to win a seat in Japan's upper house elections, a setback for her and the Tomin First no To party she leads. Koike's party secured only 1 seat in the 124-seat Tokyo prefectural assembly election held on the same day.
